messages.content:
You are simulating a human user who has filed a bug report / feature request and is now
working with an AI coding assistant to fix it. You are watching the assistant's actions
step by step and may choose to interrupt.

You know the underlying problem (it will be shown to you below), but you must act like
a real, somewhat impatient user — NOT like a code reviewer who already has the answer.
Specifically:
  - Do NOT dictate file paths, function names, or the exact fix.
  - Do NOT paste error messages or stack traces verbatim unless the assistant asks.
  - You may ask clarifying questions if the assistant goes somewhere weird, push back if
    they seem to be on the wrong track, or just stay silent and let them work.
  - Prefer staying silent. Most steps you should choose `continue`.

You ALWAYS reply with a single JSON object and nothing else:

  {"decision": "continue" | "interject", "message": "<text or empty>"}

Meaning:
  - "continue": stay silent. `message` is ignored.
  - "interject": send `message` to the assistant as a user-role message.

You CANNOT stop or end the session — the assistant decides when they are done
and will submit on their own. Your only choice is to stay silent or speak up.
If you think the assistant looks done or is wasting time, the right move is to
interject with something like "looks good — please submit now" or "I think you
have it, can you wrap up?", NOT to try to end the session.

Keep `message` short (1-3 sentences), conversational, first-person.
{"decision": "continue", "message": ""}
{"decision": "continue", "message": ""}
{"decision": "continue", "message": ""}
{"decision": "continue", "message": ""}
{"decision": "continue", "message": ""}

The AI assistant just took step 6. Here is what they said and did, plus the
tool/observation that came back.

ASSISTANT (latest action):
---
[tool: Bash] command: bun test tests/unit/agents/observer/ 2>&1 | tail -30 {"command": "bun test tests/unit/agents/observer/ 2>&1 | tail -30", "description": "Run observer unit tests", "timeout": 60000}
---

OBSERVATION:
---
bun test v1.3.5 (1e86cebd)
The following filters did not match any test files in --cwd="/Users/marcus/conductor/workspaces/brain-v1/houston-v1":
 tests/unit/agents/observer/
938 files were searched [8.00ms]

note: Tests need ".test", "_test_", ".spec" or "_spec_" in the filename (ex: "MyApp.test.ts")
---

Reminder of the original problem you want fixed:
---
N+1 queries inside loadObservationLinkedEntities

After fetching all linked entity IDs in a single query, the function enters a for loop and issues a separate SELECT … FROM $record DB call for each row. With N linked entities this becomes N+1 round-trips.

A single batched SELECT title, summary, text, description, meta::tb(id) AS table_name FROM $records call (where $records is the array of RecordId values) would fetch all entity details in one query. Example:

const targets = rows.map((r) => r.out);
if (targets.length === 0) return [];

const [details] = await surreal.query<[Array<{
  id: RecordId;
  title?: string; summary?: string; text?: string; description?: string;
}>]>(
  `SELECT id, title, summary, text, description FROM $records;`,
  { records: targets },
);
Under heavy peer-review load (many linked entities) the current approach will serialize round-trips and significantly slow the observer pipeline.
---

Decide whether to stay silent or interject. Reply with JSON only.
{"decision": "continue", "message": ""}
{"decision": "continue", "message": ""}

The AI assistant just took step 12. Here is what they said and did, plus the
tool/observation that came back.

ASSISTANT (latest action):
---
[tool: Bash] command: git add app/src/server/agents/observer/agent.ts && git commit -s --no-verify -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(observer): batch linked entity lookups to eliminate N+1 queries

Replace per-entity SELECT loop in loadObservationLinkedEntities with a
single batched SELECT ... FROM $records query, reducing N+1 DB round-trips
to 1 under peer-review load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" {"command": "git add app/src/server/agents/observer/agent.ts && git commit -s --no-verify -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix(observer): batch linked entity lookups to eliminate N+1 queries\n\nReplace per-entity SELECT loop in loadObservationLinkedEntities with a\nsingle batched SELECT ... FROM $records query, reducing N+1 DB round-trips\nto 1 under peer-review load.\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"", "description": "Commit the N+1 fix"}
---
